title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF TAGLIBI CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PATIKUL, PROVINCE OF SULU, TO DATU UDDIN BAHJIN CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2475 / 60 OG No. 43, 6973 (October 26, 1964)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3914, June 18, 1964 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF TAGLIBI CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PATIKUL, PROVINCE OF SULU, TO DATU UDDIN BAHJIN CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled

:

SECTION 1. The name of Taglibi Central Elementary School in the Municipality of Patikul, Province of Sulu, is changed to Datu Uddin Bahjin Central Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1964.
